title: Cannot login to account
description: User reports that they are unable to login with correct credentials.

title: Payment not going through
description: Customer tried to pay but the transaction fails with error code 502.

title: Typo on homepage
description: There's a spelling mistake in the welcome banner.

title: Feature request: Dark mode
description: User suggests adding a dark mode theme option.

title: Bug in email notifications
description: User did not receive email when ticket was updated.

title: App crash on launch
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after launching.

title: Unable to reset password
description: Password reset link sends user to 404 page.

title: Slow loading dashboard
description: Dashboard takes too long to load after login.

title: Incorrect data in reports
description: Monthly reports show wrong totals for sales.

title: Request for invoice copy
description: Customer needs an invoice for last month's purchase.

title: UI layout breaks on mobile
description: Elements overlap when viewing on small screen devices.

title: Feature request: Multi-language support
description: User would like to use the app in Spanish.

title: Problem with two-factor authentication
description: 2FA codes not being accepted even when correct.

title: Data export not working
description: CSV export fails with timeout error.
